name: Crusty Crescent Taco Squares
recipeIngredient: 2 (8 oz.) cans Pillsbury Refrigerated Crescent Rolls
1 cup shredded monterey jack cheese, (4 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Brown the ground beef and onions; drain excess fat.
3. Stir in taco seasoning mix, refried beans, and tomato sauce. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Unroll the dough into 4 long rectangles on a greased jelly roll pan.
5. Press the dough over the bottom and up the sides to form a crust.
6. Brush the dough with oil and sprinkle with cornmeal.
7. Spoon the hot meat mixture onto the crust.
8. Bake at 375°F for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
9. Sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese and monterey jack cheese.
10. Return to oven for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
11. Cut into squares.
12. Top with lettuce, chopped tomatoes, and taco sauce as desired.
Makes 8 servings.
Per serving: 560 calories, 25 g protein, 41 g carbohydrate, 32 g fat, 1460 mg sodium, 490 mg potassium
Pillsbury Easy & Elegant Recipes, Pillsbury Classics #10, p. 59
